title: berkheya caffra
intro: Berkheya caffra is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its bright yellow or orange daisy-like flowers. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Berkheya caffra include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in Africa.
